Package [org.apache.flink.connector.base.source.reader](<package-summary.html>)

# Class SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase<E,T,SplitT extends [SourceSplit](<../../../../api/connector/source/SourceSplit.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.connector.source"),SplitStateT>

[java.lang.Object](<https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/Object.html> "class or interface in java.lang")

[org.apache.flink.connector.base.source.reader.SourceReaderBase](<SourceReaderBase.html> "class in org.apache.flink.connector.base.source.reader")<E,T,SplitT,SplitStateT>

org.apache.flink.connector.base.source.reader.SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase<E,T,SplitT,SplitStateT>

Type Parameters:
    `E` \- The type of the records (the raw type that typically contains checkpointing information).
    `T` \- The final type of the records emitted by the source.
    `SplitT` \- The type of the splits processed by the source.
    `SplitStateT` \- The type of the mutable state per split.

All Implemented Interfaces:
    `[AutoCloseable](<https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/lang/AutoCloseable.html> "class or interface in java.lang")`, `[CheckpointListener](<../../../../api/common/state/CheckpointListener.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.common.state")`, `[SourceReader](<../../../../api/connector/source/SourceReader.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.connector.source")<T,SplitT>`

Direct Known Subclasses:
    `[FileSourceReader](<../../../file/src/impl/FileSourceReader.html> "class in org.apache.flink.connector.file.src.impl")`

* * *

[@PublicEvolving](<../../../../annotation/PublicEvolving.html> "annotation interface in org.apache.flink.annotation") public abstract class SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase<E,T,SplitT extends [SourceSplit](<../../../../api/connector/source/SourceSplit.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.connector.source"),SplitStateT> extends [SourceReaderBase](<SourceReaderBase.html> "class in org.apache.flink.connector.base.source.reader")<E,T,SplitT,SplitStateT>

A base for [`SourceReader`](<../../../../api/connector/source/SourceReader.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.connector.source")s that read splits with one thread using one [`SplitReader`](<splitreader/SplitReader.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.base.source.reader.splitreader"). The splits can be read either one after the other (like in a file source) or concurrently by changing the subscription in the split reader (like in the Kafka Source).

To implement a source reader based on this class, implementors need to supply the following:

  * A [`SplitReader`](<splitreader/SplitReader.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.base.source.reader.splitreader"), which connects to the source and reads/polls data. The split reader gets notified whenever there is a new split. The split reader would read files, contain a Kafka or other source client, etc.
  * A [`RecordEmitter`](<RecordEmitter.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.base.source.reader") that takes a record from the Split Reader and updates the checkpointing state and converts it into the final form. For example for Kafka, the Record Emitter takes a `ConsumerRecord`, puts the offset information into state, transforms the records with the deserializers into the final type, and emits the record.
  * The class must override the methods to convert back and forth between the immutable splits (`SplitT`) and the mutable split state representation (`SplitStateT`).
  * Finally, the reader must decide what to do when it starts ([`SourceReaderBase.start()`](<SourceReaderBase.html#start\(\)>)) or when a split is finished ([`SourceReaderBase.onSplitFinished(java.util.Map)`](<SourceReaderBase.html#onSplitFinished\(java.util.Map\)>)).

public SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase([Supplier](<https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/17/docs/api/java.base/java/util/function/Supplier.html> "class or interface in java.util.function")<[SplitReader](<splitreader/SplitReader.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.base.source.reader.splitreader")<[E](<SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase.html> "type parameter in SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase"),[SplitT](<SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase.html> "type parameter in SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase")>> splitReaderSupplier, [RecordEmitter](<RecordEmitter.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.connector.base.source.reader")<[E](<SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase.html> "type parameter in SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase"),[T](<SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase.html> "type parameter in SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase"),[SplitStateT](<SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase.html> "type parameter in SingleThreadMultiplexSourceReaderBase")> recordEmitter, [Configuration](<../../../../configuration/Configuration.html> "class in org.apache.flink.configuration") config, [SourceReaderContext](<../../../../api/connector/source/SourceReaderContext.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.api.connector.source") context)

The primary constructor for the source reader.

The reader will use a handover queue sized as configured via [`SourceReaderOptions.ELEMENT_QUEUE_CAPACITY`](<SourceReaderOptions.html#ELEMENT_QUEUE_CAPACITY>).
